title: Q K V Roles
learning_goal: Establish the three functional roles each token adopts: Query (asks), Key (answers), Value (carries info).

manim_objects.content: Three 'Q' role cards, one per source token
Three 'K' role cards, one per source token
Three 'V' role cards, one per source token
Text labels: 'Query — asks', 'Key — answers', 'Value — carries info'

animation_sequence.action: FadeIn source token tiles with lag_ratio=0.2.
Q cards appear below each source token (FadeIn with lag_ratio).
animation_sequence.manim_hint: LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(q_row[i]) for i in range(3)], lag_ratio=0.3)

animation_sequence.action: K cards appear below Q cards.
animation_sequence.manim_hint: LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(k_row[i]) for i in range(3)], lag_ratio=0.3)

animation_sequence.action: V cards appear below K cards.
animation_sequence.manim_hint: LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(v_row[i]) for i in range(3)], lag_ratio=0.3)

animation_sequence.action: Write three role labels to the left of each row.

music_sfx_cues.purpose: Accent when Q cards peel off from source tokens.

acceptance_checks: Q, K, V colours exactly match the global style tokens.
Roles are named before any matrix multiplication is shown.
Labels 'asks / answers / carries info' appear together at the end.
No PixVerse layer — all geometry is Manim exact.
